creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 187764
patch to the ports tree

The attachment updates devel/visualparadigm to build 20171007. This is a minor update and the upstream project doesn't offer any information about these kind of updates.

Q/A:
 - portlint -AC: OK
 - poudriere builds for {10.3,10.4,11.0,11.1}{amd64,i386}: OK
